---
title: "Kiley Martin"
image: media/IMG_2393.JPG
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 17em
---

PhD Candidate at the Tufts University Neuroscience & Neurogenetics Program at The Jackson Laboratory

Email: Kiley.Martin\@jax.org

[Joy Lab Website](https://www.mjoylab.com)

[Linkedin](www.linkedin.com/in/kiley-martin-400596191)

[Day In The Life](https://youtu.be/e1-hWnhrljs?si=w7iaMXKYkZ_bXUTF)
